regression_check: test_rate_limit_backoff.py asserts 429-wrapped SSE error events trigger backoff retry, eventual success keeps status=completed, exhausted budget terminates as status=rate_limited with last_error populated, and non-rate-limit errors do NOT retry.
reviewer_notes: Smallest-correct-change scope per _shared-engineering.md rule 1. UI: only the AgentRunCard status badge is included (matches user-locked decision before plan exit); a Dashboard banner showing last-hour rate_limited runs is intentionally deferred to a follow-up ticket — the badge alone removes the silent-failure UX. DB column added via new migration 021 (002 was already taken). Pre-existing frontend test failures (IssueDeltaChip / IssueFilterChip / IssueStageChip / IssueRow / IssuesHeader / IssuesPage / onboardingFlow) are CSS-token drift unrelated to this change — confirmed none import AgentRun-related code beyond unrelated type aliases. AgentRateLimitError subclasses AgentProcessError so the new except clause must precede the existing process-error handler (already ordered correctly).
